content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Debugging with AI to Solve Code Errors
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with bugs. Master AI-assisted debugging with Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver client projects faster and with higher quality.
content.answer_block: Debugging is the primary bottleneck for every high-velocity freelancer. By integrating Antigravity for architectural analysis and Claude Code for iterative CLI-based remediation, you can transform complex stack traces into resolved pull requests in minutes. This workflow shifts your role from manual debugger to high-level system orchestrator.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, your client is waiting, and your terminal is bleeding red error logs. We have all been there—staring at a cryptic traceback for three hours, knowing that a single missing dependency or logical fallacy is sabotaging your sprint. It is the silent killer of project profitability and the fastest way to lose momentum on a high-stakes contract.

But the era of manual, line-by-line debugging is dead. By leveraging AI-native tools like Antigravity and Claude Code, you can treat your codebase as a queryable database of logic. This approach doesn't just patch a bug; it accelerates your entire development lifecycle, turning your debugging process into a competitive advantage that keeps your margins high and your clients impressed.

steps.title: Ingest and Analyze the Error Context
steps.description: Before applying a fix, you must feed the AI the full context of the failure, including the stack trace and relevant file dependencies.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current error stack trace. Map the dependency chain for the affected module and identify the root cause based on recent git changes.

steps.title: Isolate the Logic Failure
steps.description: Use AI to sandbox the problematic function to ensure your fix doesn't introduce regressions in other parts of the system.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a minimal reproduction test case for the identified bug and isolate the logic within a sandbox environment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "create a test file for the bug and isolate the logic"

steps.title: Generate the Remediation Plan
steps.description: Request a non-destructive fix strategy that prioritizes system stability over quick hacks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Propose three potential fixes ranked by complexity and performance impact. Focus on clean, maintainable patterns.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask "Propose a fix strategy for this bug that avoids changing the public API signature."

steps.title: Execute the Automated Patch
steps.description: Apply the fix directly through the CLI, allowing the AI to handle the syntax and imports automatically.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Apply the selected fix and verify that the implementation adheres to existing project linting rules.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit ./src/affected-module.ts --instruction "Apply the fix identified in the previous step and run the test suite."

steps.title: Verify and Validate Regression
steps.description: Final check to ensure the fix resolved the error and that all existing tests pass.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a final audit of the changes. Check for potential memory leaks or performance regressions introduced by the fix.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "npm test && npm run build"

pro_tips: Always use the '--verbose' flag in Claude Code when dealing with complex dependency resolution to see the reasoning chain.
Tag your bug reports with specific ticket IDs in your prompts to keep your AI-driven commit history organized for client audits.
Never accept the first AI-generated patch; ask it to 'verify the implementation against edge cases' to catch hidden logic errors.
Use Antigravity to generate documentation for your fixes automatically, keeping your client's technical debt low.
Map your project's architectural constraints in a 'context.md' file that Claude Code can read to ensure every fix aligns with your project's coding standards.
content.next_steps: After mastering AI debugging, integrate these tools into your CI/CD pipeline to automate error reporting and resolution before you even open your editor.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting bugs dictate your delivery schedule and start shipping with absolute confidence. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
